sub: Real engagements, measurable outcomes. Here's a snapshot of how we've helped teams move faster on the cloud.

cases.challenge: A fast-growing SaaS company struggled with escalating AWS costs and performance bottlenecks as their user base scaled from 10k to 500k users.
cases.solution: Implemented auto-scaling architecture, optimized database queries, and introduced caching layers. Migrated to containerized microservices on ECS.
results: Scaled to 2M users without infrastructure changes

cases.challenge: A financial services firm needed to modernize their legacy on-premise infrastructure while maintaining strict compliance and security requirements.
cases.solution: Designed hybrid cloud architecture with AWS, implemented encryption at rest and in transit, automated compliance monitoring, and executed phased migration.

cases.challenge: A healthcare provider wanted to leverage AI for patient diagnosis support but lacked the infrastructure and expertise to implement machine learning models.
cases.solution: Built HIPAA-compliant ML pipeline on AWS, trained custom models for medical image analysis, and integrated with existing EMR systems.

cases.challenge: An e-commerce platform experienced frequent outages during peak shopping seasons, resulting in lost revenue and poor customer experience.
cases.solution: Implemented serverless architecture with Lambda and DynamoDB, added CloudFront CDN, and built real-time inventory management system.

cases.challenge: A B2B SaaS startup needed to build a scalable multi-tenant platform from scratch with tight budget and timeline constraints.
cases.solution: Architected cloud-native solution using AWS services, implemented CI/CD pipeline, and built automated testing framework.

cases.challenge: A data analytics company needed to process and analyze petabytes of data in real-time for their enterprise clients.
cases.solution: Built data lake on S3, implemented real-time processing with Kinesis and Lambda, and created interactive dashboards with QuickSight.

cases.challenge: A fintech startup required a secure, scalable payment processing system that could handle high transaction volumes with low latency.
cases.solution: Designed event-driven architecture with SQS and SNS, implemented fraud detection with ML, and built PCI DSS compliant infrastructure.

cases.challenge: A telemedicine platform needed to scale rapidly during the pandemic while ensuring HIPAA compliance and data security.
cases.solution: Migrated to containerized architecture on EKS, implemented end-to-end encryption, and built automated compliance monitoring.
